author: doll-agent
content:
Already implemented. f32 SIMD intrinsic kernels at parity with f64.

dispatch.rs has dedicated pulp WithSimd impls for SqrtF32Op (line 353), AbsF32Op (486), NegF32Op (511), SquareF32Op (536), ReciprocalF32Op (561).

simd_f32.rs has binops: add_f32 (41), mul_f32 (47), sub_f32 (53), div_f32 (59).

Each routes through pulp's f32s lane type with runtime dispatch (SSE2/AVX2/AVX-512/NEON). Closing as already-resolved.
